technical_machines.name: Dragon Claw
technical_machines.location: Removed from Route 26; now only available in Goldenrod lottery.

technical_machines.name: Water Pulse
technical_machines.location: Also received from a Fisherman in Route 32's Pokémon Center.

technical_machines.name: Calm Mind
technical_machines.location: Received from a man in Goldenrod City's Pokémon Center.

technical_machines.name: Toxic
technical_machines.location: Automatically obtained after defeating Petrel in the Cliff Cave.

technical_machines.name: Hail
technical_machines.location: Also buyable from the shop in Mahogany Town.

technical_machines.name: Bulk Up
technical_machines.location: Received from a man in Goldenrod City's Pokémon Center.

technical_machines.name: Hidden Power
technical_machines.location: Received as a reward in the Ruins of Alph for capturing 7 different types of Unown.

technical_machines.name: Sunny Day
technical_machines.location: Also buyable from the shop in Mahogany Town.

technical_machines.name: Taunt
technical_machines.location: The copy in Burned Tower has been removed.

technical_machines.name: Ice Beam
technical_machines.location: Also found in Ice Path. Reduced to 4,000 Coins in Goldenrod Game Corner.

technical_machines.name: Rain Dance
technical_machines.location: Also buyable from the shop in Mahogany Town.

technical_machines.name: Giga Drain
technical_machines.location: Also found in an item ball on Route 39.

technical_machines.name: Thunderbolt
technical_machines.location: Also found on small shore right of Olivine Lighthouse. Reduced to 4,000 Coins in Goldenrod Game Corner.

technical_machines.name: Dig
technical_machines.location: Removed from Celadon City, purchasable in Goldenrod City.

technical_machines.name: Psychic
technical_machines.location: Also found to the bottom-right of the Ruins of Alph.

technical_machines.name: Brick Break
technical_machines.location: Received from a man on Route 36.

technical_machines.name: Shock Wave
technical_machines.location: Received from a man in Azalea Pokémon Center.

technical_machines.name: Flamethrower
technical_machines.location: Also found on Bellchime Trail. Reduced to 4,000 Coins in Goldenrod Game Corner.

technical_machines.name: Sandstorm
technical_machines.location: Also buyable from shop in Mahogany Town.

technical_machines.name: Thief
technical_machines.location: Removed from Rocket Hideout; obtainable from a man in Azalea Town.

technical_machines.name: Steel Wing
technical_machines.location: Found in an item ball in Olivine Lighthouse.

technical_machines.name: Skill Swap
technical_machines.location: Also buyable from shop in Mahogany Town.

technical_machines.name: Overheat
technical_machines.location: Also obtainable in Burned Tower basement.

technical_machines.name: Energy Ball
technical_machines.location: Received as a gift from a girl on Route 39; buyable in Celadon.

technical_machines.name: Brine
technical_machines.location: Removed from Celadon Mart; buyable in Goldenrod Mart.

technical_machines.name: Will-O-Wisp
technical_machines.location: Obtained from Fantina in Ecruteak's Mart.

technical_machines.name: Flash
technical_machines.location: Removed from Goldenrod; given as a free gift in Route 10 Pokémon Center.

technical_machines.name: Stone Edge
technical_machines.location: Obtainable from a man in Indigo Plateau; purchasable in Celadon City.

technical_machines.name: Thunder Wave
technical_machines.location: Obtained from Volkner in Olivine Lighthouse.

technical_machines.name: Stealth Rock
technical_machines.location: Found on the ground in the middle entrance of Mt. Mortar.

technical_machines.name: Rock Slide
technical_machines.location: Also in Ruins of Alph, behind the 'LIGHT' door.

technical_machines.name: X-Scissor
technical_machines.location: Received from a Bug Catcher in Ilex Forest; buyable in Celadon.

technical_machines.name: Poison Jab
technical_machines.location: Also automatically obtained after battling Ariana on Route 47.

technical_machines.name: Grass Knot
technical_machines.location: Obtainable from Gardenia in Ilex Forest; buyable at Goldenrod Dept. Store.

technical_machines.name: Trick Room
technical_machines.location: Also obtainable from a clown in Ecruteak City.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Aubade Orb
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; found in an item ball on Route 42.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Chilled Ore
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; found in an item ball in Ice Path.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Covenant Orb
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: One is automatically received after finishing any in-game trade.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: DeepSeaScale
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Also hidden on the beach on Route 47, closer to the Embedded Tower entrance.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: DeppSeaTooth
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Also hidden on the beach on Route 47, closer to the Cliff Cave exit.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Dragon Scale
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Also obtainable in Blackthorn City's Pokémon Center as a gift.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Dubious Disc
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Moved to Team Rocket's Hideout.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Electirizer
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Found on Route 44.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: King's Rock
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Also given to you by a man in Mahogany's Pokémon Center.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Magmarizer
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Found inside Ice Path, top floor.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Metal Coat
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Given to you by a man in a house in Olivine City.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Oval Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: In an item ball on Route 34.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Protector
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Found in the first room of Victory Road.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Razor Claw
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Given to you by a man in a house in Cianwood.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Razor Fang
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Given to you by a man in a house in Cianwood.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Reaper Cloth
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Found in Dark Cave when entering from the Blackthorn Side.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Serenade Orb
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; found in an item ball behind the 'LIGHT' wall in Ruins of Alph.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Up-Grade
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: As a gift in the Ruins of Alph for catching 14 Unown; also received from a man in the Safari Zone's Pokémon Center after the Rocket invasion is gone.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Voltaic Ore
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Found in Route 42, by the apricorn trees; found past the whirlpool on Route 27.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Woodland Ore
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; found in an item ball in Ilex Forest.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Dawn Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Item ball on Route 35; buyable in Blackthorn.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Dusk Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Mt. Mortar's second room; buyable in Blackthorn.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Fire Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; also purchasable in Goldenrod.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Leaf Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Also purchasable in Goldenrod.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Moon Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Obtainable once a day from a man in Olivine during night hours.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Shiny Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Battle Frontier entrance*; buyable in Blackthorn.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Sun Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Obtainable once a day from a man in Olivine during daylight hours.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Thunder Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; also purchasable in Goldenrod.

Evolutionary_Item_Locations.name: Water Stone
Evolutionary_Item_Locations.location: Received from Sprout Tower's head sage; also purchasable in Goldenrod.

New_Key_Item_Locations.name: Old Rod
New_Key_Item_Locations.location: Obtained from the Guide Gent in Cherrygrove City.

New_Key_Item_Locations.name: Good Rod
New_Key_Item_Locations.location: Given by a Fisherman in Olivine's diner.

New_Key_Item_Locations.name: Super Rod
New_Key_Item_Locations.location: Given by a Fisherman in Blackthorn City.

New_Key_Item_Locations.name: Bycycle
New_Key_Item_Locations.location: : Given to you by your mother at the start of the game.

New_Key_Item_Locations.name: GB Sounds
New_Key_Item_Locations.location: Given to you by your mother at the start of the game.

New_Fossil_Locations.name: New Fossil Locations
New_Fossil_Locations.location: One of each fossil is obtained for free from a man in Goldenrod's Archaelogical Center (what used to be the Bike Shop), with the exception of Aerodactyl; the Old Amber must be found normally. Fossils can now be revived in Goldenrod.

New_Other_Item_Locations.name: Exp Share
New_Other_Item_Locations.location: Given to you by a Scientist in Violet's Pokémon Center.

New_Other_Item_Locations.name: Lucky Egg
New_Other_Item_Locations.location: Given to you by Mr. Pokemon in exchange for the Red Scale, and also by a guy in the Ruins of Alph as a reward for catching 21 Unown.

New_Other_Item_Locations.name: Thick Club, Light Ball, Stick, etc
New_Other_Item_Locations.location: There's a woman in the Goldenrod Magnet Train station who will give you the relevant item when you show her the Pokémon who the item correlates to (e.g. she'll give you a Thick Club if you have a Cubone or Marowak behind you).
